expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states Phase 5b enforces this: “Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit `[ANALOG-GATE]` entries…” and “The release recommendation must enumerate all `[ANALOG-GATE]` items that remain blocking before ship.” This directly matches “required-before-ship gates” as a blocking checkpoint.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md anchor the evaluation to Phase 5b: execution_notes.md says it “Reviewed the Phase 5b rubric… confirmed it… as blocking `[ANALOG-GATE]` items in the Phase 5b release recommendation.” result.md section “Phase 5b is the correct primary phase alignment” lists Phase 5b purpose, required artifacts (e.g., `context/checkpoint_audit_<feature-id>.md`, `context/checkpoint_delta_<feature-id>.md`, `drafts/qa_plan_phase5b_r<round>.md`), and acceptance gate criteria, demonstrating phase5b alignment.
